preprocessing: None - used texts as-is with labels normalized to 0-1
description: OneStopEnglish corpus with 189 texts at 3 reading levels (Elementary, Intermediate, Advanced), each text appears in all 3 versions
citation: Vajjala, S., & Lučić, I. (2018). OneStopEnglish corpus: A new corpus for automatic readability assessment and text simplification. ACL.
